Our Craft

Every bouquet is a
keepsake, not a cut flower.

Bloom & Bow creates handcrafted keepsake bouquets designed for birthdays, graduations, anniversaries, celebrations, and the moments you don't want to let go of.

Each one is built by hand, petal by petal, with premium materials and an eye for detail — so it lives on the shelf long after the occasion has passed, exactly as beautiful as the day it arrived.

Designed to be kept. Not just given.

Our Bouquets

The Collection

Four handcrafted designs, each made in-house — the true, unfiltered work of Bloom & Bow.

Signature

Pink Bouquet

A full, sculptural dome of shimmering blush roses, finished with a gilded crown accent and a hand-tied bow.

Statement

Red Bouquet

A dozen glimmering ruby roses in a structured black and gold wrap — the bouquet made for candlelit dinners and nights worth dressing up for.

Milestone

Graduation Bouquet

Sapphire-glitter roses in a sleek black and white wrap, made to mark the day the hard work finally pays off.

Sentimental

Teddy Bear Bouquet

Blush glitter roses cradling a plush keepsake bear — soft, sweet, and made to be held onto.

The Difference

Why Bloom & Bow

I

Handcrafted

Built by hand, one bouquet at a time — never mass produced.

II

Premium Materials

Quality wraps, ribbons, and finishes chosen for how they age, not just how they photograph.

III

Personalized

Colors, charms, and add-ons tailored to the person you're giving it to.

IV

Luxury Wrapping

Structured, boutique-style presentation, finished with a signature bow.

V

Made With Love

Every order is treated like it's the only one we're making that day.

VI

Beautiful Presentation

Designed to be unwrapped slowly — and kept long after.

Good to Know

Frequently Asked

Yes — colors, ribbon styling, and keepsake add-ons like charms or a teddy bear can all be tailored to the occasion.
Since every bouquet is handcrafted rather than cut fresh flowers, it doesn't wilt — it's designed to be displayed and kept as a lasting keepsake.
Message us directly on Instagram or email with your occasion, preferred colors, and date needed, and we'll walk you through the rest.
Local delivery and pickup are available in the Atlanta, Georgia area — reach out for details on your specific location.
